name: YOHANE THE PARHELION -SUNSHINE in the MIRROR
original_name: 幻日のヨハネ -SUNSHINE in the MIRROR-
overview: The story reimagines Yoshiko Tsushima, the school idol afflicted with chuunibyou (adolescent delusions of grandeur), as a magical girl. The story is set in Numazu, a scenic harbor town surrounded by the sea and mountains. Ever since she was little, the girl Yohane has never fit in, and has always felt apart from everyone in town. Her aspirations and true place in this world lie elsewhere. The story follows this girl who can't follow rules as she journeys into the mysterious world.

trailers.title: [ENG] Yohane of the Parhelion -SUNSHINE in the MIRROR- Anime Trailer 2
